name: KlipVault Video Downloader
description: Companion browser extension for KlipVault (https://klipvault.xyz). Downloads videos from YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, X, Reddit, Twitch, Vimeo, and more using yt-dlp. Enables HLS stream downloads and automatic cookie extraction for authenticated platforms.

data_collection_permissions.description: Cookies are extracted only for the specific video platform being downloaded (Instagram, X/Twitter, Reddit, TikTok, Facebook, Pinterest) and passed directly to the local yt-dlp installation. They are never uploaded, stored, or shared. Download history and usage counters are stored only in the browser's local storage and never leave the device.
